reasoning.summary: Feasibility reasoning over evidence and preconditions.

results.name: Initial Access via Phishing
results.explanation: User interaction and macro execution leading to outbound beaconing. Missing evidence: email_attachment_open, macro_execution, beacon_outbound
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require email_attachment_open, macro_execution, beacon_outbound but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Privilege Escalation
results.explanation: Evidence of elevating access beyond initial privileges. Missing evidence: token_manipulation, admin_group_change
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require token_manipulation, admin_group_change but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Credential Dumping
results.explanation: Requires elevated privileges to access credential stores. Missing evidence: process_creation, lsass_access, precond:privilege_escalation
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require process_creation, lsass_access, precond:privilege_escalation but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Lateral Movement
results.explanation: Requires valid credentials before remote execution. Missing evidence: remote_service_creation, network_logon, precond:credential_access
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require remote_service_creation, network_logon, precond:credential_access but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Persistence
results.explanation: Persistence established after initial access. Missing evidence: registry_run_key, scheduled_task, precond:initial_access
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require registry_run_key, scheduled_task, precond:initial_access but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Command and Control
results.explanation: C2 established after initial access. Missing evidence: beacon_outbound, dns_tunneling, precond:initial_access
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require beacon_outbound, dns_tunneling, precond:initial_access but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Exfiltration
results.explanation: Exfiltration typically follows C2 and credential access. Missing evidence: data_staging, large_outbound_transfer, precond:c2_established, precond:credential_access
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require data_staging, large_outbound_transfer, precond:c2_established, precond:credential_access but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Identity Anomaly (Impossible Travel / New Device)
results.explanation: Identity anomalies indicate possible account compromise. Missing evidence: impossible_travel, new_device_login
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require impossible_travel, new_device_login but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: MFA Disable or Bypass
results.explanation: MFA changes combined with token anomalies indicate bypass. Missing evidence: mfa_method_removed, token_refresh_anomaly, precond:identity_compromise
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require mfa_method_removed, token_refresh_anomaly, precond:identity_compromise but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Suspicious LOLBin Execution Chain
results.explanation: LOLBin execution following initial access suggests hands-on-keyboard activity. Missing evidence: process_creation, lolbin_execution, precond:initial_access
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require process_creation, lolbin_execution, precond:initial_access but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Extended Persistence Mechanisms
results.explanation: Persistence via registry and services after initial access. Missing evidence: registry_run_key, service_install, precond:initial_access
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require registry_run_key, service_install, precond:initial_access but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Valid Accounts Abuse

missing_evidence.description: Login using valid credentials in unusual context

results.explanation: Compromised valid accounts enable access without malware. Missing evidence: signin_success, new_device_login
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require signin_success, new_device_login but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Brute Force / Credential Stuffing
results.explanation: High-volume authentication failures followed by access attempts. Missing evidence: password_spray, credential_stuffing
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require password_spray, credential_stuffing but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Account Manipulation
results.explanation: Account changes used to persist or elevate access. Missing evidence: account_manipulation, admin_group_change, precond:identity_compromise
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require account_manipulation, admin_group_change, precond:identity_compromise but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Modify Authentication Process
results.explanation: Authentication controls were altered to bypass access checks. Missing evidence: auth_process_modify, mfa_method_removed, precond:identity_compromise
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require auth_process_modify, mfa_method_removed, precond:identity_compromise but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Application Layer Protocol C2
results.explanation: C2 over common application protocols for stealth. Missing evidence: app_layer_c2, beacon_outbound, precond:initial_access
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require app_layer_c2, beacon_outbound, precond:initial_access but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Impair Defenses

missing_evidence.description: Cloud firewall or security group opened

results.explanation: Defensive controls weakened to evade detection. Missing evidence: disable_logging, cloud_firewall_change
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require disable_logging, cloud_firewall_change but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Exfiltration Over Web Service
results.explanation: Exfiltration using legitimate web services. Missing evidence: exfil_web_service, large_outbound_transfer, precond:c2_established
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require exfil_web_service, large_outbound_transfer, precond:c2_established but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Phishing via Link and OAuth Consent

missing_evidence.description: OAuth consent granted to suspicious app

results.explanation: Link phishing followed by OAuth consent indicates account compromise. Missing evidence: phish_link_click, oauth_consent
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require phish_link_click, oauth_consent but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Mailbox Rule Persistence
results.explanation: Persistence through mailbox rules and forwarding. Missing evidence: mailbox_rule_create, forwarding_rule_set, precond:signin_success
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require mailbox_rule_create, forwarding_rule_set, precond:signin_success but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
results.explanation: Encryption activity at scale indicates ransomware impact. Missing evidence: mass_file_rename, encrypt_activity, precond:privilege_escalation
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require mass_file_rename, encrypt_activity, precond:privilege_escalation but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Inhibit System Recovery
results.explanation: Recovery features disabled to prevent restoration. Missing evidence: shadow_copy_delete
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require shadow_copy_delete but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Insider Data Exfiltration
results.explanation: Large-scale access without compromise signals suggests insider misuse. Missing evidence: bulk_download, unusual_access_scope, precond:signin_success
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require bulk_download, unusual_access_scope, precond:signin_success but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Supply Chain Compromise
results.explanation: Build pipeline compromise with artifact tampering. Missing evidence: ci_runner_compromise, artifact_tamper
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require ci_runner_compromise, artifact_tamper but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Cloud Lateral Movement
results.explanation: Cross-account pivot using trust policy changes. Missing evidence: role_assume, trust_policy_change
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require role_assume, trust_policy_change but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: SaaS Admin Takeover
results.explanation: Admin access gained through OAuth grants and role changes. Missing evidence: new_admin_role, oauth_app_grant, precond:identity_compromise
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require new_admin_role, oauth_app_grant, precond:identity_compromise but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Network Evasion via Proxy/Tunnel
results.explanation: Evasive networking used to hide C2 channels. Missing evidence: domain_fronting, tor_exit, dns_tunnel, precond:initial_access
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require domain_fronting, tor_exit, dns_tunnel, precond:initial_access but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Disable or Modify Security Logging
results.explanation: Disabling logging to hide attacker activity. Missing evidence: disable_logging, policy_bypass, precond:initial_access
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require disable_logging, policy_bypass, precond:initial_access but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Bulk Data Exfiltration
results.explanation: Bulk data access followed by outbound transfer. Missing evidence: bulk_download, large_outbound_transfer, precond:credential_access
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require bulk_download, large_outbound_transfer, precond:credential_access but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Admin Protocol Lateral Movement
results.explanation: Lateral movement over admin protocols with valid credentials. Missing evidence: new_inbound_admin_protocol, network_logon, precond:credential_access
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require new_inbound_admin_protocol, network_logon, precond:credential_access but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Device Code Phishing
results.explanation: Abuse of device code authentication flow indicates likely credential theft. Missing evidence: device_code_flow_start, device_code_flow_success
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require device_code_flow_start, device_code_flow_success but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: OAuth Consent Phishing

missing_evidence.description: New app grant with elevated scopes

results.explanation: Malicious app consent grants attacker access tokens and persistent access. Missing evidence: oauth_consent, new_app_grant
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require oauth_consent, new_app_grant but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Device Join Phishing
results.explanation: Phishing to register attacker-controlled device to tenant. Missing evidence: device_join_request, device_join_complete
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require device_join_request, device_join_complete but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Stolen Credentials Initial Access
results.explanation: Stolen credentials used for initial access, often detected by token reuse. Missing evidence: signin_success, token_reuse
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require signin_success, token_reuse but no such evidence was observed.

results.name: Stolen Credentials with Anomalous Access
results.explanation: Stolen credentials with anomalous device access indicate initial compromise. Missing evidence: signin_success, token_reuse, new_device_login
results.gap_narrative: This attack would require signin_success, token_reuse, new_device_login but no such evidence was observed.
